text:
The Rich Couple are a recurring pair in the manga used to provide comic relief. They first appear in Chapter 17 outside a jewellery shop in Rush Valley. They appear multiple times after that, usually having their vehicle commandeered or stolen at gunpoint.

Trivia

The couple seems to travel very often, as they have been seen in many places around the country.
When the couple talks to each other in Japanese, there are always hearts in their speech bubbles.
Despite playing only a very minute role in the manga, their one appearance in the 2003 anime, in Episode 26, has them reduced only to one-time-only background characters with a single line each. The female's design differs heavily from the manga as well.
